text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during training camp...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: And that should do it for today's schedule.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heh, did I rush through it a bit too quickly?
choice_data_list: Do you want to do some extra training?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, thanks. It's a bit early, but let's call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I promised to meet the younger
students for a party tonight.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp training is pretty hardcore, so it
helps if we all support each other!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm in charge of the shopping because I have a
car, so it's time to get going!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? You're coming with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? You're coming with me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's take a drive and watch the beautiful sunset!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: VRRROOOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Blasting away at top speed while surrounded by
nature is just the best! And the sunset is gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I finish up shopping and return to
the car. Just as we're about to head back...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: This can't be! Why aren't you moving?! What's wrong, Tata?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky's car suddenly breaks down.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if Tata is having a hard time driving on
these unfamiliar, rough roads...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What should I do? I'm worried about her, but
everyone is expecting me at the party...
choice_data_list: You should go see your junior classmates.
Let's see if we can fix your car somehow.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What? You want me to go ahead and leave you
here, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What? You want me to go ahead and leave you
here, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I guess I could deliver everything in time if I run
fast enough, but...
choice_data_list: Think of it as today's extra training!
Think of it as today's extra training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Geez, how am I supposed to refuse when you
put it that way? No fair, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But okay, I'll hurry and deliver what we bought!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be back as soon as I deliver it, so take care of
Tata until then!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What a perfect little workout! Off I go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And just like that, Maruzensky takes off at top
speed with the goods in hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The car is later fixed without incident, and the
party ends up a huge success.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Even if we did try to fix her, I wouldn't know
where to start...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I've got it! Maybe banging on her a little
will do the trick!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's what you do when your TV's picture is all
fuzzy, right? You give it a karate chop at a
forty-five degree angle!
choice_data_list: I mean, I don't do that, but...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Isn't that what everybody does?!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A-anyway, um, let's give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, Tata, wake up! This is no time for a
nap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maruzensky bangs on the steering wheel, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vroom... VROOOOOM!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: It worked! Tata's awake!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. Sometimes it just takes a good thumping!
Come on, let's head back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, with the car finally moving again, we're
able to get safely back to camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But when Maruzensky extols the virtues of hitting
stuff to fix it, everyone at the party insists that
she's just going to break things.
